text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
After I worked so hard to train for this... And I ran
so hard in the race today...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
choice_data_list: Let's make sure we win next time!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
choice_data_list: Let's make sure we win next time!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yeah, you're right. This isn't the end!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: All right! I gotta get back into the swing of things!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
From here on, I think only about the next race! I'll
work harder than ever to win it!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I'll give it everything I have—full power for total
victory! And then we'll both smile and laugh!
Woooo!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: You're upset too... I see—it isn't just me.
choice_data_list: Let's use this feeling as a springboard!
Let's use this feeling as a springboard!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: You mean use this frustration... to leap forward?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I'll hold on tight to this feeling! And then...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I'll make absolutely sure I never make you feel
this way again!
